text: The description header should use the same element structure and styling as the "Live Output" and "Source Feedback" - right now it seems to be a different type of input with different spacing and styles

proposedTasks.title: Unify Description header with Live Output and Source Feedback header components
proposedTasks.description:
The Description collapsible header in the feedback detail view uses a different element structure and styling (spacing, typography, collapse affordance) than the Live Output and Source Feedback headers. Refactor the Description header to reuse the same shared collapsible-header component and CSS classes used by Live Output and Source Feedback so all three sections are visually identical.

Acceptance criteria:
- Description header renders using the exact same component (or shared abstraction) as Live Output and Source Feedback headers
- Padding, margin, font size, font weight, icon placement, and collapse/expand behavior match across all three headers
- No visual regression to Live Output or Source Feedback headers

taskTitles: Unify Description header with Live Output and Source Feedback header components
